_meta.description: Corridor Gas Pipeline Data Tracker — operational scoreboard
_meta.note: This file is the single source of truth for gas pipeline data completeness and freshness. GitHub Action reads staleness_rules to create issues when data is overdue.

gas_pipelines.notes: ASP.NET ViewState POST portal. IOC (tab-delimited FERC H/D/P), OAC line sections, unsub locations.
Complex ownership: Questar → Dominion → Southwest Gas → Williams. Now MountainWest Pipeline.
Renamed EGTS after BHE acquisition. Also covers Carolina Gas Transmission and Cove Point.
Acquired by Third Coast Midstream. BBT/Quorum platform.
Small New England system. May not be in MISO/ERCOT/SPP footprint.

LA. BBT/Quorum platform tspno=12.
ONEOK REST JSON API. No auth. IOC via base64 FERC H/D/P, OAC + Unsub via JSON.
Portal blocked from cloud (Incapsula WAF), browser-only downloads. Manual refresh required.
Storage facility in Logan County CO. Portal blocked from cloud (Incapsula WAF), browser-only downloads.
Gathering pipeline in Weld County CO. Portal blocked from cloud (Incapsula WAF), browser-only downloads.

Trailblazer Pipeline (WY-CO-NE). Zero HIFLD points exist. EIA also has zero segments. All geocoding is county-centroid or known-city. Completes the Tallgrass family with REX (501), ECGS (335), Cheyenne Connector (314).

Formerly KMIGT (Kinder Morgan Interstate Gas). Sold to Tallgrass 2012. 4,650 miles across WY/CO/NE/KS/MO. 721 LDC delivery points, 29 pipeline interconnects, 116 end-users. Two zones: TIGT-W (western) and TIGT-E (eastern). HIFLD still lists under old KM Interstate Gas name. Largest single pipeline in Tallgrass family.

capacity.notes: KM portal does not publish OAC/design capacity for WIC

gas_pipelines.notes: ~850 miles WY to CO. 34 pipeline interconnects, 21 gas plants, 6 pooling points, 4 storage. Major Cheyenne Hub feeder. KM portal code=WIC. 9.4M Dth/d total contracted — heavily utilized.
